description_long: This object is a pair of over-ear headphones with a modern, robust design, featuring large, cushioned ear cups and a wide, padded headband. The ear cups are oval-shaped and appear to be made of a matte plastic shell with soft, black foam padding for comfort. The headband is reinforced with a metallic or plastic frame and has a secondary, flexible inner band for better fit and support. Visible on the ear cups are subtle branding details and what appears to be a small control button or port, likely for connectivity or power. The headphones have a sleek, two-tone color scheme with light gray and black as the dominant colors. The overall construction suggests durability and comfort, suitable for extended use in urban environments.
description: A modern pair of over-ear headphones with cushioned black ear cups, a wide padded headband, and a sleek two-tone gray and black finish. Branding and a small control button are visible on the ear cups.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing both large, cushioned ear cups and the wide, padded headband arching above.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the headband and the branding on the outer ear cup.
description_view_2: Reverse front view showing the inner padding of the ear cups and a small control button or port on the left side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the other ear cup's branding and the headband's attachment point.
